name: Button
description: Glossy aqua actions with seven variants and a tactile press.

name: Badge
description: Compact status pills, from glossy primary to soft intents.

name: Input
description: A recessed glass text field with an aqua focus ring.

name: Textarea
description: Multi-line input matching the recessed field style.

name: Label
description: An accessible, selectable form label.

name: Checkbox
description: A recessed tile that fills with a glossy aqua check.

name: Radio Group
description: Single-select circles, each lighting up with an aqua dot.

name: Switch
description: A glossy aqua toggle with a glassy thumb.

name: Slider
description: A recessed track with an aqua range and a glassy thumb.

name: Select
description: A frosted-glass dropdown with highlighted items.

name: Card
description: The signature frosted-glass surface, with a wet top sheen.

name: Alert
description: Glass callouts in four intents.

name: Separator
description: A hairline divider for sections.

name: Avatar
description: A rounded image with a graceful fallback.

name: Dialog
description: A glass modal floating over a blurred scrim.

name: Popover
description: A floating glass panel anchored to a trigger.

name: Tooltip
description: A small hint shown on hover or focus.

name: Tabs
description: A segmented glass switcher with a raised active pill.

name: Accordion
description: Collapsible sections with a smooth height transition.

name: Progress
description: A recessed track with a glossy aqua fill.

name: Skeleton
description: A pulsing placeholder for loading content.

name: Spinner
description: A bright aqua loading spinner.

name: Circular Gauge
description: An animated ring gauge with an aqua glow.

name: Orb
description: A soft, blooming aqua orb for hero backdrops.

name: Bubbles
description: Rising water bubbles to overlay on glass.
